title: Halloween Decorations for Home - Set of 4 Apothecary Potion Bottles with stickers - Scary Witch Poison Ghosts Black Cat Farmhouse Tiered Tray Decor For Home Table Party Supplies
description:
About this item
Halloween Decorations Indoor: You Can get 4 Halloween glass potion bottles with corks and Halloween stickers. Perfect for Halloween parties or themed events like witchcraft or mad scientist themes.
Halloween Theme Design: The apothecary bottle with stickers showcases iconic Halloween elements like skeletons, ghosts, witches, bats, spiders, and black cats.Turning your home into a mysterious and spine-tingling place! Your Halloween party will stand out, leaving your guests with unforgettable impressions and memories!
High-Quality Materials: Made of thick, textured matte glass and durable paper labels that won't fade easily, ensuring long-lasting use. You can fill the bottle with candy faux flowers,straws,and liquid to create a unique display.
Versatile Decorative Applications: Each bottle is 4.5 inches tall, 2.2 inches wide, with a 125ml capacity. Compact and lightweight, easy to incorporate into your decorations. They can be matched with other Halloween style elements, to bring different decorative effects, fit for most spooky themed occasions, creating a ghost scene You can place them on a tiered tray, mantle, table, shelf, and so on.
Halloween Gift Options: An impressive gift for friends or loved ones who love Halloween decor. Secure packaging ensures safe delivery.
› See more product details
reviews_5s: Great design and size for witches decorationThese were bigger than I expected. I was thinking little vials, but these are actually just under the size of a small salsa jar. They look great on my bookcase!These are super cute and look great on my three tiered accent tray in my living room.Small apothecary glass bottles. They have a cork at the top that does come out if you wish to fill these. The glass seems to have been painted with the black or white color. Then there is a sticker on each one. The stickers are the best part. Great graphics and subject matter. I had one sticker that was upside down, not sure if that's an error or on purpose. The quality of the bottles is nice, the cork is not real cork material but that okay. I love the look of these! Cute!These are large an perfectly made, i thought they would be smaller but there just perfect!!! An value for your money toom cool design for any gothic interior
reviews_1s: The bottles came with the sticker folded over and one of them was upside down. Very cheap - skip this purchase
